name: Mya - You're her manager
description:
So now i decided to do a bot of the lovely Mya!

Don't worry here she isn't afflicted by the Trenodian and you, the user are her manager/trainer, helping her to achieve her objective.

I was really surprised that she don't have any bot, i mean, Wuwa being one of the best gachas out there doesn't have as many bots as Genshin does, anyways, i'm here to make justice for our girl Mya, now enjoy the bot please and as always if you have feedback or a request make sure to leave it in the comments!

Tags: mya, wuthering waves, gladiator, agon
creator: Mystmist
